biglake_configuration.description: Defines the configuration for BigLake tables, including connection settings, file format, storage URI, and table format. Requires valid connection ID and supported file/table formats.

clustering.description: Specifies the columns used for clustering in the table, which helps improve query performance. Columns must exist in the table schema.

dataset_id.description: Identifies the dataset to which the table belongs. Must be a valid dataset ID within the project.

deletion_protection.description: Enables or disables deletion protection for the table, preventing accidental deletion when set to true.

description.description: Provides additional information or purpose of the table. Limited to 1,024 characters.

encryption_configuration.description: Configures encryption for the table, including the KMS key name and optional key version. Requires access to the specified KMS key.

expiration_time.description: Sets the expiration time for the table in milliseconds since the Unix epoch. Must be a positive number.

external_data_configuration.description: Defines configuration for external data sources, including connection, formats, and options for Avro, CSV, Bigtable, and other data types. Source URIs are required.
external_data_configuration.type: list(object({autodetect: bool,compression: optional(string),connection_id: optional(string),file_set_spec_type: optional(string),ignore_unknown_values: optional(bool),json_extension: optional(string),max_bad_records: optional(number),metadata_cache_mode: optional(string),object_metadata: optional(string),reference_file_schema_uri: optional(string),schema: optional(string),source_format: optional(string),source_uris: list(string),avro_options: list(object({use_avro_logical_types: bool})),bigtable_options: list(object({ignore_unspecified_column_families: optional(bool),output_column_families_as_json: optional(bool),read_rowkey_as_string: optional(bool),column_family: list(object({encoding: optional(string),family_id: optional(string),only_read_latest: optional(bool),type: optional(string),column: list(object({encoding: optional(string),field_name: optional(string),only_read_latest: optional(bool),qualifier_encoded: optional(string),qualifier_string: optional(string),type: optional(string)}))}))})),csv_options: list(object({allow_jagged_rows: optional(bool),allow_quoted_newlines: optional(bool),encoding: optional(string),field_delimiter: optional(string),quote: string,skip_leading_rows: optional(number)})),google_sheets_options: list(object({range: optional(string),skip_leading_rows: optional(number)})),hive_partitioning_options: list(object({mode: optional(string),require_partition_filter: optional(bool),source_uri_prefix: optional(string)})),json_options: list(object({encoding: optional(string)})),parquet_options: list(object({enable_list_inference: optional(bool),enum_as_string: optional(bool)}))}))

friendly_name.description: Specifies a user-friendly name for the table. Must be unique within the dataset and limited to 1,024 characters.

labels.description: Defines key-value pairs for categorizing or tagging the table. Keys must be 1-63 characters, and values up to 63 characters.

materialized_view.description: Defines a materialized view with refresh settings, query, and optional non-incremental definitions. Query must be valid SQL.

max_staleness.description: Specifies the maximum staleness allowed for queries against the table. Must be a valid duration string.

range_partitioning.description: Defines range partitioning for the table, including the field and range settings. Field must exist in the schema.
range_partitioning.type: list(object({field: string,range: list(object({end: number,interval: number,start: number}))}))

require_partition_filter.description: Indicates whether queries on partitioned tables must include a partition filter. Improves query performance when enabled.

resource_tags.description: Specifies resource tags for the table as key-value pairs. Tags must follow organizational policies.

schema.description: Defines the schema for the table. Must be a valid JSON string representing the table's structure.

table_constraints.description: Specifies table constraints, including primary keys and foreign keys. Constraints must match the schema and referenced tables.
table_constraints.type: list(object({foreign_keys: list(object({name: optional(string),column_references: list(object({referenced_column: string,referencing_column: string})),referenced_table: list(object({dataset_id: string,project_id: string,table_id: string}))})),primary_key: list(object({columns: list(string)}))}))

table_id.description: Specifies the unique name of the table within the dataset. Must follow naming conventions and be unique within the dataset.

table_metadata_view.description: Defines a metadata view for the table. Typically used for managing or querying metadata.

table_replication_info.description: Provides replication settings for the table, including source details and replication intervals. Source table must be accessible.

time_partitioning.description: Configures time-based partitioning for the table, including expiration, field, and partition type settings. Field must exist in the schema.

view.description: Defines a SQL view for the table, including query and optional use of legacy SQL. Query must be valid SQL.
